inventory.MD:
Battery Operated 66NM Cordless drilling machine. with 2x 20V 2A Battery.

The INGCO Cordless Impact Drill with Brushless Motor CIDLI20668 is a standout among power tools, ideal for DIYers and pros alike.

Its brushless motor is a game-changer. It boosts efficiency, extends runtime, and cuts down on maintenance compared to brushed motors. This drill delivers a powerful 66 Nm of torque, easily handling drilling and driving tasks in wood, metal, and more.
